description_long: This is a modern office building with a rectangular footprint, featuring a multi-story structure and a flat roof. The exterior is clad in a combination of dark and light panels, with large, regularly spaced windows providing ample natural light to the interior. The front of the building includes a curved glass facade and landscaped green areas, adding visual interest and a welcoming entrance. A ground-level parking lot with marked spaces and several parked vehicles is integrated into the property, accessible via a wide driveway. The rooftop and terrace areas are partially landscaped, with some outdoor seating and greenery visible. The building's design emphasizes functionality and contemporary aesthetics, suitable for urban commercial use.
description: A modern, multi-story office building with a curved glass facade, landscaped areas, and an integrated ground-level parking lot. The exterior features large windows and a mix of dark and light paneling.
description_view_0: Front view showing the curved glass facade, landscaped entrance, and the full parking lot with multiple vehicles.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the regular window pattern and the building's boxy, multi-story structure with minimal landscaping.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the parking lot, driveway, and the transition between the building's dark and light exterior panels.
description_view_3: Opposite front view focusing on the parking lot layout, vehicle arrangement, and the main entrance area.
attribute_window_pattern: Regularly spaced rectangular windows in a grid pattern across all visible facades.
